title: × laeliocattleya menezesiana

The roots of the × laeliocattleya menezesiana contain compounds like glycosides and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat fever and infections. side_effects: × laeliocattleya menezesiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, or digestive problems, especially if its sap or leaves are ingested.
